description: Preview GitHub Flavored Markdown in VS Code with GitHub-compatible rendering and themes.
command.changeThemeMode.title: GitHub Markdown: Change Theme Mode
command.changeSingleTheme.title: GitHub Markdown: Change Single Theme
command.changeLightTheme.title: GitHub Markdown: Change Light Theme
command.changeDarkTheme.title: GitHub Markdown: Change Dark Theme
configuration.theme.mode.description: Select a single theme, or follow the preview's light and dark color scheme
configuration.theme.mode.single.enum.des: GitHub will use your selected theme
configuration.theme.mode.system.enum.des: GitHub Markdown will use the selected light or dark theme to match the preview
configuration.theme.single.description: The theme used in single theme mode
configuration.theme.light.description: Theme used when the Markdown preview is in light mode
configuration.theme.dark.description: Theme used when the Markdown preview is in dark mode
configuration.theme.light.enum.descripti: GitHub's standard light theme with full color contrast and brightness.
configuration.theme.light_colorblind.enu: For people who may find it difficult to distinguish between reds and greens.
For people who need higher contrast between interface elements.
configuration.theme.light_tritanopia.enu: For people who find it difficult to distinguish between blues and greens, as well as yellows and purples.
configuration.theme.dark.enum.descriptio: GitHub's standard dark theme with full color contrast and brightness on a dark background.
configuration.theme.dark_colorblind.enum: For people who may find it difficult to distinguish between reds and greens, with a dark background.
configuration.theme.dark_dimmed.enum.des: A dark theme with reduced contrast for comfortable viewing in low-light environments.
configuration.theme.dark_high_contrast.e: For people who need higher contrast between interface elements, with a dark background.
configuration.theme.dark_tritanopia.enum: For people who find it difficult to distinguish between blues and greens, as well as yellows and purples, with a dark background.
configuration.accessibility.linkUnderlin: Show underlines on links in text blocks, matching GitHub's default accessibility setting.
configuration.mermaid.syncTheme.descript: Synchronize the light and dark themes used by VS Code's built-in Mermaid renderer or markdown-mermaid with GitHub Markdown. Disabling synchronization restores previous values without replacing newer Mermaid choices.
